title: Inside the Darkness - Horror
description: Optimized Horror and Realistic Modpack with multiple horror mods
body:
![title2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79acb9a756bc5238d522edf3ed86d6d1315bd624.png)
## Overview
Inside the Dark is a paranoia-based modpack. There is the possibility of being attacked by unknown entities who want to harm you. To survive, it is advisable to protect yourself and stay on your guard. There will be entities that will be there to drive you crazy, be careful.
## 

# ⚠️⚠️ A reworked version is in creation with a best performance and horror ⚠️⚠️

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oh7IbRza2uA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 

## System Requirements
- Operating System: Windows, macOS, Linux
- RAM: Minimum 8GB (16GB recommended for the best experience)
- GPU: DirectX 11 or OpenGL 4.5 compatible
- To run the shaders I recommend at least an RTX 2060 and a 13th gen i5, 12th or 11th gen i7, or 10th gen i9

## LICENCE
You can contact me on my discord server if your mod in the modpack is not mentioned.

You are allowed to play with my modpack and in addition to modifying it but any post that looks like or copies my modpack must contain my permissions or credit. I am not concerned with any problem that may have otherwise contacted me if it concerns my modpack or credits that I need to add.
